| Layer | Technology | Version | Justification |

## Forge 8-Layer Map

### Layer 1 — Config (`src/config/`)
```
constants.js    → [list key constants]
routes.js       → [list all routes]
theme.js        → [list design token groups]
permissions.js  → [list roles: admin, manager, viewer, etc.]
api.js          → [list API endpoints]
features.js     → [list feature flags]
env.js          → [list required env vars]
```

### Layer 2 — Types (`src/types/`)
```
common.types.js     → SortDirection, PaginationMeta, ApiResponse
[domain].types.js   → [Entity], [Entity]Status enum
[domain].types.js   → [Entity], [Entity]Status enum
```

### Layer 3 — Data (`src/data/`)
```
[domain].data.js    → [N] records, [N] edge cases
[domain].data.js    → [N] records, [N] edge cases
index.js            → re-exports all
```

### Layer 4 — Utils (`src/utils/`)
```
formatters.js   → formatCurrency, formatDate, formatPercent, formatNumber
calculators.js  → [list business calculations]
validators.js   → validateEmail, validateRequired, validateNumber
dateHelpers.js  → formatRelative, isOverdue, daysBetween
arrayHelpers.js → filterByQuery, sortArray, paginate, groupBy
stringHelpers.js → truncate, slugify, capitalize
colorHelpers.js → getStatusColor, getStatusBg
```

### Layer 5 — Hooks (`src/hooks/`)
```
useFilter.js        → filter + search + sort any list
usePagination.js    → paginate any list
useDebounce.js      → debounce fast-changing values
useLocalStorage.js  → persist state to localStorage
useMediaQuery.js    → detect responsive breakpoints
useToast.js         → toast notification state
useModal.js         → modal open/close/payload
useForm.js          → form state + validation
useAsync.js         → async operation state
useClickOutside.js  → detect click outside ref
useKeyboard.js      → keyboard shortcut registration
useIntersection.js  → IntersectionObserver wrapper
useReducedMotion.js → prefers-reduced-motion detection
```

### Layer 6 — Services (`src/services/`)
```
api.service.js      → base fetch wrapper: auth, retry (max 3), timeout
auth.service.js     → login, logout, refreshToken, getCurrentUser
[domain].service.js → fetchAll, fetchById, create, update, delete
[domain].service.js → fetchAll, fetchById, create, update, delete
storage.service.js  → localStorage/sessionStorage abstraction
export.service.js   → PDF/CSV generation
```

### Layer 7 — Components (`src/components/`)

**Tier A — UI Primitives (`ui/`):**
```
Button, Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch
Badge, Tag, Card, Avatar, Divider
Modal, Drawer, Popover, Tooltip, Dropdown
Tabs, Accordion, Stepper
Table, Pagination, Progress
Skeleton, Spinner, Alert, Toast
EmptyState, ErrorState
DatePicker
```

**Tier B — Layout (`layout/`):**
```
AppShell, Sidebar, SidebarGroup, SidebarItem
TopBar, MobileNav
PageHeader, PageContainer
SplitLayout, GridLayout
CommandPalette, NotificationPanel
```

**Tier C — Shared (`shared/`):**
```
KPICard, MetricCard, TrendBadge
DataTable, FilterBar, SearchInput, SortMenu
StatusBadge, PriorityBadge
ChartWrapper, ChartLine, ChartBar, ChartDonut
ConfirmDialog, DeleteDialog, FormModal
ExportButton, DateRangePicker
LoadingOverlay
```

### Layer 8 — Features (`src/features/`)
```
[module]/   → [description: what this module manages]
[module]/   → [description: what this module manages]
[module]/   → [description: what this module manages]
```

## Data Models

### [Entity Name]
```typescript
interface [Entity] {
  id:          string    // UUID v4
  name:        string    // max 120 chars
  status:      [Entity]Status
  // [add all fields]
  createdAt:   string    // ISO 8601
  updatedAt:   string    // ISO 8601
}

enum [Entity]Status {
  ACTIVE   = 'active',
  INACTIVE = 'inactive',
  DRAFT    = 'draft',
  ARCHIVED = 'archived',
}
```

---

## API Contract

### [Resource] Endpoints

```
GET    /api/[resource]          → List with pagination + filters
POST   /api/[resource]          → Create new
GET    /api/[resource]/:id      → Get single
PATCH  /api/[resource]/:id      → Update (partial)
DELETE /api/[resource]/:id      → Delete

Standard response shape:
  Success: { data: T, error: null, meta?: PaginationMeta }
  Error:   { data: null, error: string, fields?: Record<string, string> }

Standard error codes:
  400 → Validation failed
  401 → Authentication required
  403 → Insufficient permissions
  404 → Resource not found
  409 → Conflict (duplicate)
  500 → Internal server error
```

---

## State Architecture

```
GLOBAL STATE (React Context):
  AuthContext:         user, isLoading, login, logout, hasPermission
  ThemeContext:        theme, isDark, toggleTheme
  NotificationContext: toasts, addToast, removeToast

MODULE STATE (per feature hook):
  use[Module]:         [entity]s, isLoading, error, CRUD handlers, filter/sort/pagination

LOCAL STATE (per component):
  [Component]:         isOpen, hoveredId, activeTab (UI-only state)
```

---

## Data Flow Diagrams

### [Primary User Action]
```
User clicks "[Action]"
    ↓
[Module]Page.jsx (Layer 8) — calls handler
    ↓
use[Module].js (Layer 5) — manages state
    ↓
[entity]Service.[method]() (Layer 6) — API call
    ↓
apiService.post/patch/delete() (Layer 6 base)
    ↓ API responds
use[Module].js — updates state (optimistic or confirmed)
    ↓
[Module]Page.jsx — re-renders with new data
    ↓
Toast notification (useToast)

ERROR PATH:
API returns error
    ↓
apiService returns { data: null, error: "message" }
    ↓
use[Module].js — reverts optimistic update + sets error
    ↓
Toast error notification
```

---

## Build Sequence

See `rules/11-build-sequence.md` for the complete sequence.

```
Phase 0: Foundation (config, types, utils/formatters, styles)
Phase 1: Data layer (calculators, sample data)
Phase 2: UI primitives (Button, Input, Modal, etc.)
Phase 3: Layout (AppShell, Sidebar, contexts)
Phase 4: Shared components (DataTable, KPICard, etc.)
Phase 5: [Module 1] feature
Phase 6: [Module 2] feature
Phase 7: [Module 3] feature
```
